items.title: [正面] A very good strategy game. Hard as nails until you...
items.summary:
A very good strategy game. Hard as nails until you get it, and then it is still hard as nails but now you understand where you messed up. 

Gacha is very generous, doubly so if you are a character (plus signature weapon) collector and don't want to get dupes of every character.

I don't pull for dupes and I personally have cleared all the hardest modes with 0-dupes teams.

Story is amazing. Music is even moreso.

Past banners and events keep getting rerun every 2 weeks, so at no point you will feel you are lost. Lots of game modes to choose from.

Chapter 1 has just had its conclusion in December '24. We are about to start Chapter 2.

items.title: [正面] I give this game 8.4  if you plan everything accor...
items.summary: I give this game 8.4  if you plan everything accordingly you wont have to spend money unless you want to support the game, want to max out all the characters, or if you want to beat this game in less than 2 months  story is good 90 percent of the time for a free game that decent. music with the story telling is what makes this game good. (recommend headphones)  it would of got a higher score if they kept the music dreary all the time. when the music changes it just takes you out of whats going on in that world. combat is good when you pull the characters you can build good teams. Every character is good enough to play with you as long as they are paired with the right characters. (this how you build decks by pairing the characters together) they did amazing job with this part usually free games fall apart here. Over all  i do recommend giving this game a try.

items.title: [正面] Artes muito bem feitas e gameplay divertida
items.summary: Artes muito bem feitas e gameplay divertida
